commands.review_summary:
The branch adds bounded cooperative yields and abort checks while draining Ollama native NDJSON stream events, plus a regression test that timers can fire before dense stream completion.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +41. Total +82 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main drains all parsed lines from one native Ollama read without a macrotask yield, and the branch adds a dense-stream regression test for timer progress before completion. I did not execute tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer and CI landing for a maintainer-labeled PR with no actionable patch defect found.

target.title: fix(ollama): yield during dense stream processing
target.body:
## Summary

- ports the Ollama dense stream cooperative-yield fix from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86633 onto a current maintainer branch, preserving @udaymanish6 as commit author
- yields and checks aborts while draining dense native Ollama NDJSON chunks so one large read cannot monopolize the Gateway event loop
- adds a regression test that proves timers can run before dense stream processing completes

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.
Supersedes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86633 as the rebased maintainer branch.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: dense native Ollama stream chunks now cooperatively yield during parsing instead of draining an entire large read in one synchronous loop.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux lease against this branch, plus Ollama Cloud live smoke with `gemma3:4b`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 timeout 240s corepack pnpm test extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose
OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=gemma3:4b OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS=0 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 timeout 360s corepack pnpm test:live -- extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix: Crabbox AWS `run_d281cee2dcdd` passed `extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts` with 11/11 tests, including `yields to the event loop while processing dense native stream chunks`; Crabbox AWS `run_20baec24925c` passed the Ollama live fixture with 2 passed / 2 skipped.

Observed result after fix: dense stream unit coverage confirms timer progress during parser drain; the Ollama live path still completes infer and native chat calls through the provider.

What was not tested: Windows local-daemon reproduction from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599 was not rerun in this PR. This is one mitigation in the broader event-loop starvation cluster, not the final issue closeout by itself.
target.author: vincentkoc
